calendar.matters:
CASE MANAGEMENT CONFERENCE
Off Calendar Oct-07-2016 Off Calendar

Plaintiff State Farm General Insurance Companys Notice And Motion For Default Judgment Against Defendant Sergio Villagran
Off Calendar Sep-15-2016 Granted Per Written Order
MINI MINUTES: This cause came on regularly as scheduled this day for Default Prove-Up Hearing.
Dept. 514, Judge: Joseph J. Carson, Clerk: A. Mok, CSR: Gena Eales, CSR 176.

Grotefeld Hoffmann, Esq., appearing for Plaintiff, State Farm General Insurance Company,
No appearance by defaulted defendant Sergio Villagran,
Default of Defendant has been duly entered.

Witness: Adam Ly sworn and examined on behalf of Plaintiff.
After Evidence and good cause appearing, the Court rules in favor of Plaintiff and against Defaulted Defendant as follows:

Damages: $306,038.70
Pre-Judgment Interest: $17,084.83
Attorney's Fees: $0
Costs: $515.95
Total Judgment in the amount of $323,639.48

Judgment signed in open court.

CASE MANAGEMENT CONFERENCE
Off Calendar Jul-18-2016 Continued To Oct-26-16 At 10:30 A.M. In Dept 610

CASE MANAGEMENT CONFERENCE
Off Calendar Mar-21-2016 Continued To Aug-03-16 At 10:30 A.M. In Dept 610
